label: Game-playing, control & simulation agents

node.label: Game-playing, control & simulation agents
node.definition: Game-playing and control agents select actions in simulated or real environments through search, reinforcement learning, learned dynamics, or opponent modeling.
node.why_it_matters: The role of Game-playing, control & simulation agents is to connect Model-based reinforcement learning, Monte Carlo tree search to downstream capabilities including Simulation, operations research & wargaming.
examples: substrate for Simulation, operations research & wargaming
limitations: End-to-end quality is bounded by the weakest data, model, tool, interface, policy, infrastructure, and human-oversight component. Its direct dependencies include Model-based reinforcement learning, Monte Carlo tree search.
